policy.trains_on_input_detail: "Anthropic may not train models on Customer Content from Services." Exception: explicit opt-in to Development Partner Program.
policy.retention_detail: Inputs and outputs automatically deleted within 30 days.
policy.zero_retention_detail: Available for enterprise API customers with Anthropic approval.
policy.abuse_monitoring_detail: Safety classifier results always retained. Flagged content: I/O up to 2 years, scores up to 7 years.
policy.human_review_detail: Trust & Safety team only, on flagged content. Strict access controls.
policy.dpa_detail: Auto-incorporated into Commercial Terms with SCCs.
policy.data_location_detail: Data stored in US. Traffic routed through US, Europe, Asia, Australia.
policy.deletion_detail: Deleted within 30 days of request.

policy.trains_on_input_detail: Yes by default, opt-out at claude.example/settings/data-privacy-controls. Exceptions: (1) feedback you provide, (2) content flagged for safety.
policy.retention_detail: Training ON: up to 5 years (de-identified). Training OFF: 30 days. Feedback: 5 years. Safety-flagged: 2yr I/O, 7yr scores.
policy.abuse_monitoring_detail: Always active regardless of training preference.
policy.human_review_detail: Training reviewers (limited, de-identified) + T&S team for flagged content.
policy.deletion_detail: Deleted conversations are not used for future model training.
policy.notes: Incognito mode available — chats not used for training even if Model Improvement is enabled. Still has 30-day backend retention.

policy.trains_on_input_detail: Same as Free tier. Yes by default, opt-out at claude.example/settings/data-privacy-controls.
policy.retention_detail: Training ON: up to 5 years (de-identified). Training OFF: 30 days. Safety-flagged: 2yr I/O, 7yr scores.
policy.abuse_monitoring_detail: Always active regardless of training preference.
policy.human_review_detail: Training reviewers (limited, de-identified) + T&S team for flagged content.
policy.dpa_detail: Consumer product — no DPA available. Paying does not change the data terms.
policy.deletion_detail: Deleted conversations are not used for future model training.
policy.notes: Paying for Pro does NOT give enterprise-grade privacy. Same consumer terms as Free.

policy.trains_on_input_detail: Same as Free/Pro. Yes by default, opt-out available.
policy.retention_detail: Training ON: up to 5 years. Training OFF: 30 days.
policy.human_review_detail: Training reviewers (limited, de-identified) + T&S team for flagged content.
policy.deletion_detail: Deleted conversations not used for training.
policy.notes: Max is a consumer tier despite high price. Same privacy terms as Free/Pro.

policy.trains_on_input_detail: Consumer auth = signing into Claude Code with your personal claude.example account (Free, Pro, or Max) via OAuth. This means consumer terms apply and your data may be used for training by default. Opt out at claude.example/settings/data-privacy-controls. Paying for Pro or Max does NOT change this — the privacy terms are the same as Free.
policy.retention_detail: Training ON: 5 years. Training OFF: 30 days.
policy.human_review_detail: Same as consumer tier — training reviewers + T&S.
policy.dpa_detail: Consumer auth — no DPA. Pro/Max subscription does not provide a DPA.
policy.deletion_detail: Same as consumer tier.
policy.notes: Consumer auth is determined by HOW you sign in (OAuth with personal account), not how much you pay. Additional telemetry: Statsig, Sentry, /feedback command. Opt-out via CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_NONESSENTIAL_TRAFFIC=1.

policy.trains_on_input_detail: Commercial auth = using an API key from a Team or Enterprise organization workspace. This means commercial terms apply — no training on your data. The API key must come from an organization account (Team or Enterprise plan), not a personal API key.
policy.retention_detail: 30 days standard. ZDR available for Enterprise.
policy.zero_retention_detail: Available for Enterprise with ZDR activated. HIPAA BAA auto-extends to Claude Code with ZDR.
policy.abuse_monitoring_detail: Safety classifier results retained. Flagged: 2yr I/O, 7yr scores.
policy.human_review_detail: T&S team only, on flagged content.
policy.dpa_detail: Auto-incorporated with SCCs. Only available with commercial auth (Team/Enterprise API key).
policy.deletion_detail: Deleted within 30 days.
policy.notes: Commercial auth is determined by the API key source (Team/Enterprise org), not by payment amount. Telemetry still applies (Statsig, Sentry) but opt-out via env var.

policy.trains_on_input_detail: Anthropic does not use data from commercial products to train models.
policy.retention_detail: 30 days standard.
policy.abuse_monitoring_detail: Safety flagging with 2yr I/O + 7yr scores for flagged content.
policy.human_review_detail: T&S team only, on flagged content.
policy.dpa_detail: Auto-incorporated with SCCs. Anthropic is Processor, Customer is Controller.
policy.deletion_detail: Data deleted after 30-day retention.

policy.trains_on_input_detail: Anthropic does not use data from commercial products to train models.
policy.retention_detail: Configurable. Minimum 30 days. Default: retained indefinitely unless custom period set.
policy.zero_retention_detail: Per-organization. Admins can set custom retention. Data past retention is permanently deleted.
policy.abuse_monitoring_detail: Safety flagging with 2yr I/O + 7yr scores for flagged content.
policy.human_review_detail: T&S team only, on flagged content.
policy.dpa_detail: Auto-incorporated with SCCs. Anthropic is Processor, Customer is Controller.
policy.deletion_detail: Enterprise admins can set auto-deletion via custom retention controls.

policy.trains_on_input_detail: Since March 2023, OpenAI does not use API data to train models unless you explicitly opt in.
policy.retention_detail: 30 days for abuse monitoring, then deleted.
policy.zero_retention_detail: ZDR tier available — request and response bodies not persisted to any logging system.
policy.human_review_detail: Possible if flagged during retention window.
policy.deletion_detail: Data deleted after 30-day retention or on request.

policy.trains_on_input_detail: Yes by default. Opt-out via Settings > Data Controls > "Improve the model for everyone."
policy.retention_detail: Conversations stored indefinitely while account exists, unless user deletes.
policy.human_review_detail: Content may be reviewed for safety and compliance.
policy.deletion_detail: Individual conversations or full account can be deleted.

policy.trains_on_input_detail: Yes by default. Same opt-out as Free tier.
policy.retention_detail: Conversations stored indefinitely unless deleted.
policy.human_review_detail: Content may be reviewed for safety and compliance.
policy.dpa_detail: Consumer product — no DPA. Paying does not change data terms.
policy.deletion_detail: Individual conversations or full account can be deleted.
policy.notes: Paying for Plus does NOT provide enterprise-grade privacy.

policy.trains_on_input_detail: Yes by default. Same consumer terms as Free/Plus.
policy.retention_detail: Conversations stored indefinitely unless deleted.
policy.human_review_detail: Content may be reviewed for safety and compliance.
policy.deletion_detail: Individual conversations or full account can be deleted.
policy.notes: Pro ($200/mo) is still a consumer product. Same privacy terms.

policy.trains_on_input_detail: OpenAI does not train on business data for Team, Enterprise, or API by default.
policy.retention_detail: 30 days for abuse monitoring.
policy.human_review_detail: If flagged during retention window.
policy.deletion_detail: Data deleted after retention period.

policy.trains_on_input_detail: No training on business data or conversations. Models don't learn from usage.
policy.retention_detail: Customer-controlled. AES-256 at rest, TLS 1.2+ in transit.
policy.human_review_detail: Not for training. Safety monitoring more restricted.
policy.deletion_detail: Customer-controlled retention and deletion.

policy.trains_on_input_detail: Prompts and completions are NOT available to OpenAI, NOT used to train any models, NOT used to improve Microsoft/3rd party products.
policy.retention_detail: 30 days default for abuse monitoring. Zero with approved modified access exemption.
policy.zero_retention_detail: With modified access exemption: no prompts/completions stored, no human review.
policy.abuse_monitoring_detail: Default yes for flagged content. With exemption: no human review, no storage.
policy.human_review_detail: Default yes for flagged. With modified access exemption: no human review.
policy.dpa_detail: Microsoft Products and Services DPA — one of most comprehensive in industry.
policy.data_location_detail: Customer chooses Azure region. EU Data Boundary available.
policy.deletion_detail: Customer-controlled via Azure data management.
policy.notes: SOC 2 Type 2, ISO 27001, HIPAA BAA available, FedRAMP (Azure Government).

policy.trains_on_input_detail: Free-tier API data CAN be used by Google to improve products including model training.
policy.retention_detail: Up to 3 years retention.
policy.human_review_detail: Google explicitly warns not to submit confidential information.
policy.data_location_detail: Google data centers (primarily US), no region choice.
policy.deletion_detail: De-identified data may persist even after deletion.
policy.notes: TRAP: Developers prototype here with real data without realizing it's used for training with 3-year retention and human review.

policy.trains_on_input_detail: Customer data is not used to train or improve Google's foundation models.
policy.retention_detail: Customer-controlled. Not used for training.
policy.zero_retention_detail: Configurable — prompts/responses not logged by default.
policy.abuse_monitoring_detail: Limited safety/abuse monitoring under DPA terms.
policy.human_review_detail: No review for model improvement.
policy.deletion_detail: Customer-controlled data management.

policy.trains_on_input_detail: Conversations used to improve Google's products. Turn off Gemini Apps Activity to limit (but not eliminate) use.
policy.retention_detail: Up to 3 years even if user deletes. De-identified data may persist. Activity off: 72-hour safety retention.
policy.human_review_detail: Yes — conversations may be reviewed by human reviewers.
policy.deletion_detail: De-identified/aggregated data may persist even after deletion request.

policy.trains_on_input_detail: Yes by default. Opt-out via Gemini Apps Activity toggle. NOT equivalent to Vertex AI protections.
policy.retention_detail: 72h if opted out, up to 3 years if opted in.
policy.human_review_detail: Conversations may be reviewed by human reviewers.
policy.dpa_detail: Consumer product despite being paid. No DPA, no contractual guarantee against training.
policy.deletion_detail: De-identified data may persist.
policy.notes: TRAP: Many assume paying = enterprise-grade. It does not. No DPA, no contractual guarantee.

policy.trains_on_input_detail: No training for Business/Enterprise/Education plans. Clear public commitment.
policy.retention_detail: Per Workspace admin settings.
policy.human_review_detail: No human review for model improvement.
policy.deletion_detail: Admin-controlled deletion.
policy.notes: Free/personal Google accounts using Gemini in Gmail/Docs are covered by consumer policy, NOT Workspace terms.

policy.trains_on_input_detail: Self-hosted open model — Google has no access to your data. Runs entirely on your own infrastructure (laptop, server, or edge device). No data is sent to Google.
policy.retention_detail: N/A — you control all data storage and retention. Nothing leaves your machine.
policy.zero_retention_detail: You control infrastructure — zero retention if you configure it. No external logging.
policy.abuse_monitoring_detail: N/A — no third-party monitoring. No telemetry sent to Google.
policy.human_review_detail: N/A — Google cannot review your data. Fully air-gapped operation possible.
policy.dpa_detail: Not needed — no data processing relationship with Google. You are the sole data controller.
policy.data_location_detail: Your infrastructure, your choice. Can run fully offline with no internet connection.
policy.deletion_detail: You control all data — delete as needed. No external copies exist.
policy.notes: Available in 4 sizes: E2B (5GB RAM), E4B (8GB RAM), 26B (16-20GB RAM), 31B (20GB+ RAM or GPU). Supports text, images, and audio. Can run via Ollama, vLLM, or direct deployment. Strongest privacy option alongside Llama — no third party sees your data. License governs redistribution/commercial use, not data handling.

policy.trains_on_input_detail: Interactions may be used to improve Meta's AI models. EU users can object under GDPR.
policy.retention_detail: Indefinite. Deletable by user, but de-identified/aggregated data may persist.
policy.human_review_detail: Yes, for safety and improvement.
policy.deletion_detail: User can delete, but de-identified data may persist.

policy.trains_on_input_detail: Self-hosted — Meta has no access to your data. Privacy is entirely in the deployer's hands.
policy.retention_detail: N/A — you control all data storage and retention.
policy.zero_retention_detail: You control infrastructure — zero retention if you configure it.
policy.human_review_detail: N/A — Meta cannot review your data.
policy.dpa_detail: Not needed — no data processing relationship with Meta.
policy.deletion_detail: You control all data — delete as needed.
policy.notes: Strongest privacy option — no third party sees your data. License governs redistribution/use, not data handling.

policy.trains_on_input_detail: API customer data not used for model training.
policy.retention_detail: ~30 days for abuse monitoring, then deleted. Zero-retention for enterprise.
policy.human_review_detail: Possible during retention, not routine.
policy.data_location_detail: EU (France-based infrastructure). Major selling point for EU companies.
policy.deletion_detail: Deleted after retention period or on request.

policy.trains_on_input_detail: Likely yes for free tier (similar pattern to other consumer AI products).
policy.retention_detail: Session-based retention. Details vary.
policy.human_review_detail: Possible.
policy.deletion_detail: User can delete conversations.
policy.notes: EU data residency is an advantage over US-based consumer products.

policy.trains_on_input_detail: Self-hosted — Mistral has no access to your data.
policy.retention_detail: N/A — you control all data.
policy.human_review_detail: N/A — Mistral cannot review your data.
policy.dpa_detail: Not needed — no data processing relationship.
policy.deletion_detail: You control all data.
policy.notes: Same as Llama — strongest privacy when self-hosted.

policy.trains_on_input_detail: Content not used to train or improve base models provided by Amazon or third-party providers.
policy.retention_detail: None by default. I/O processed in memory, not persisted unless customer enables logging.
policy.zero_retention_detail: Effectively the default — no logging unless customer enables it.
policy.abuse_monitoring_detail: Bedrock does not store or log prompts and completions.
policy.human_review_detail: No human review — data not stored.
policy.deletion_detail: No data to delete by default (not stored). Customer-enabled logs managed via AWS.
policy.notes: When using Claude/Llama/Mistral via Bedrock, data is governed by AWS policies, NOT the model provider's. SOC 2, ISO 27001, HIPAA BAA, FedRAMP available.

policy.trains_on_input_detail: AWS does not use customer content processed by Amazon Q to train or improve underlying models.
policy.retention_detail: Customer-controlled.
policy.human_review_detail: No human review.
policy.deletion_detail: Customer-controlled.
